description_long: This is a rectangular yellow juice carton with green Korean text prominently displayed on the front and top faces, indicating it is a banana-flavored milk drink. The packaging features a classic gable-top design with a white foldable spout at the top for pouring. One side of the carton displays a large QR code in yellow and white, while the opposite side contains detailed product information in small yellow text on a white background, including an 'OPEN' label at the top. The front and back faces are nearly identical, both showing the product name and volume information. The carton appears to be made of laminated paperboard, typical for beverage cartons, and is likely filled with liquid. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed for easy handling and storage in urban environments.
description: A yellow gable-top juice carton with green Korean text, a QR code on one side, and detailed product information on the other, designed for banana-flavored milk.
description_view_0: Front view showing large green Korean text, product name, and volume details on a yellow background.
description_view_1: Side view featuring a prominent yellow and white QR code and a small line of Korean text above it.
description_view_2: Back view nearly identical to the front, with green Korean text and product details.
description_view_3: Side view with detailed product information in small yellow text and an 'OPEN' label at the top.
